inflation_control_mechanisms.description: Replace mint-on-purchase with a fixed liquidity pool where buys and sells only redistribute existing assets.
inflation_control_mechanisms.effect: Eliminates new asset creation; effectively halts infinite inflation.

inflation_control_mechanisms.description: Burn a portion of every transaction fee to permanently remove assets from circulation.
inflation_control_mechanisms.effect: Reduces total supply relative to trading volume.

inflation_control_mechanisms.description: Allow users to spend assets on non-gameplay utility features like profile customization or priority access.
inflation_control_mechanisms.effect: Creates a 'black hole' for idle assets.

inflation_control_mechanisms.description: Apply lower dividend yields to larger balances, discouraging asset hoarding.
inflation_control_mechanisms.effect: Limits the power of 'whales' to generate exponential supply.

inflation_control_mechanisms.description: Automatically collect 15-25% of all dividend distributions as a platform fee/tax.
inflation_control_mechanisms.effect: Reduces the net velocity of supply growth without changing headline rates.

inflation_control_mechanisms.description: Adjust dividend weight based on the duration of asset holding or recent platform activity.
inflation_control_mechanisms.effect: Rewards active users and penalizes short-term speculative farming.

inflation_control_mechanisms.description: Gradually reduce the value of assets sitting idle in wallets over long periods.
inflation_control_mechanisms.effect: Increases asset velocity and reduces long-term inflation pressure.
